title: Customer Service Admin (Delivery Admin & Order Processing)
description:
Compensation & Benefits:

  • Basic Salary + Monthly Allowances + Yearly AWS
  • Annual Salary Increment Exercise 
  • Excellent Welfare Benefits; such as Flexi Claims (Medical, Dental, Holiday, Wellness Events & Equipment, Optical and etc)
  • Promising 12 or 14 starting Annual Leave with Progressive Annual Leave starting from 3rd Year & onward
  • Seeking employees with long term permanent position, that come with Long Service Award & Loyalty Reward

Responsibilities:

Main:

  • Handle Daily Outbound Delivery Team Duties (Schedule, Liaise, Prepare, Manage and Resolve with customers' delivery)
  • Ensure smooth delivery of products to customer & collection of any items if any

Sub:

  • Perform order processing from customers' requests (from quotation to processing orders)
  • Follow up with customers' quotation to achieve target revenue

All the time:

  • Coordinate with the various department to ensure smooth operation (required face to face communicate with the production staffs)
  • Handle customers face to face regarding ordering or outbound matters.
  • Beneficial to have basic accounting knowledge for processing of payment etc.
  • Perform any administration duties assigned when required
  • Responding to incoming email, phone, mobile platform enquiries
  • Be responsible for all correspondences, filing, photocopying, recording, documentation
  • Attending team meeting and sharing best practice with colleagues
  • Prefer to have candidates with experiences working in Singapore

Requirements:

  • Minimum GCE 'N'/'O' level with related working experiences
  • Applicant with either similar job duties will have advantages
  • Comfortable to work in different multicultural team
  • Possess strong analytic and mathematic skills
  • Possess positive working attitude and willingness to learn
  • Possess good communication skills (both written and oral) and interpersonal skills as required to handle customers enquiries daily
  • Ability to maintain confidentiality
  • Able to accept job flexibility and willingness to learn new duties
  • Ability to start work with short notice preferred
  • Applicants must be willing to work in Changi North (Preferably for applicants to stay in East area)
  • 5.5days work week with alternate Saturday
  • Mon - Fri (8am to 5.30pm); Alternate Sat (8am to 4pm)


For interested candidates, please submit your application to us with your resume stating your contact details, experiences, current and expected salary via APPLY NOW button.

(Only shortlisted candidates will be notified)

postedCompany.description:
Carlton Glass Enterprise is a highly professional of commercial and domestic glass supplier in the market.  We strive towards the highest quality product, workmanship, finishing, and customer care.

Incorporating the latest technology, we provide outstanding quality at competitive rates. With a wide range of products and services, we are the one- stop solution to customers.

 

Please browse our website to see the innovative and high quality range of products we can offer you!
postedCompany.name: CARLTON GLASS ENTERPRISE PTE LTD
